recommendations.title: Vivo
recommendations.overview: A music-loving kinkajou named Vivo embarks on the journey of a lifetime to fulfill his destiny and deliver a love song for an old friend.

recommendations.title: Space Chimps
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Comedy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: When an unmanned space shuttle crashes on an uncharted planet, a trio of astronaut chimpanzees are launched by NASA into a wormhole to investigate.

recommendations.title: The Croods
recommendations.overview: The prehistoric Croods family live in a particularly dangerous moment in time. Patriarch Grug, his mate Ugga, teenage daughter Eep, son Thunk, and feisty Gran gather food by day and huddle together in a cave at night. When a more evolved caveman name

recommendations.title: The Snow Queen 2: Refreeze
recommendations.overview: After the trolls' victory over the Snow Queen, Orm claims that he is destined to marry the princess and inherit great power.

recommendations.title: KPop Demon Hunters
recommendations.overview: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

recommendations.title: CODA
recommendations.overview: As a CODA (Child of Deaf Adults), Ruby is the only hearing person in her deaf family. When the family's fishing business is threatened, Ruby finds herself torn between pursuing her love of music and her fear of abandoning her parents.

recommendations.title: Violet Evergarden: The Movie
recommendations.overview: As the world moves on from the war and technological advances bring changes to her life, Violet still hopes to see her lost commanding officer again.

recommendations.title: New Gods: Nezha Reborn
recommendations.overview: While living as an ordinary deliveryman and motor racing fan, Nezha encounters old nemeses and must rediscover his powers to protect his loved ones.

recommendations.title: Rise of the Guardians
recommendations.overview: When an evil spirit known as Pitch lays down the gauntlet to take over the world, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.
